item.title: Audacity [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Audacity [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Audacity
(Music Production)
Audacity is a free and open-source digital audio editor and recording application software, available for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other Unix-like operating systems. As of December 6, 2022, Audacity is the most popular download at FossHub, with over 114.2 million downloads since March 2015. It was previously served from Google Code and SourceForge, where it was downloaded over 200 million times. It is licensed under GPL-2.0-or-later.
Note: I am not the developer, I am simply providing appimage
[read more]
item.description:
Audacity
(Music Production)
Audacity is a free and open-source digital audio editor and recording application software, available for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other Unix-like operating systems. As of December 6, 2022, Audacity is the most popular download at FossHub, with over 114.2 million downloads since March 2015. It was previously served from Google Code and SourceForge, where it was downloaded over 200 million times. It is licensed under GPL-2.0-or-later.
Note: I am not the developer, I am simply providing appimage
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Audacity
(Music Production)
Audacity is a free and open-source digital audio editor and recording application software, available for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other Unix-like operating systems. As of December 6, 2022, Audacity is the most popular download at FossHub, with over 114.2 million downloads since March 2015. It was previously served from Google Code and SourceForge, where it was downloaded over 200 million times. It is licensed under GPL-2.0-or-later.
Note: I am not the developer, I am simply providing appimage
[read more]

item.title: MOTRIX [P2P & Torrent]
item.itunes:title: MOTRIX [P2P & Torrent]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
MOTRIX
(P2P & Torrent)
Motrix is a full-featured download manager that supports downloading HTTP, FTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, etc.
Motrix has a clean and easy to use interface. I hope you will like it 👻.

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

Motrix has a clean and easy to use interface. I hope you will like it 👻.

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Mozilla Firefox [Browser]
item.itunes:title: Mozilla Firefox [Browser]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Mozilla Firefox
(Browser)
Mozilla Firefox, or simply Firefox, is a free and open-source web browser developed by the Mozilla Foundation and its subsidiary, the Mozilla Corporation. It uses the Gecko rendering engine to display web pages, which implements current and anticipated web standards. In November 2017, Firefox began incorporating new technology under the code name "Quantum" to promote parallelism and a more intuitive user interface. Firefox is available for Windows 10 or later versions, macOS, and Linux. Its unofficial ports are available for various Unix and Unix-like operating systems, including FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD, illumos, and Solaris Unix. It is also available for Android and iOS. However, as with all other iOS web browsers, the iOS version uses the WebKit layout engine instead of Gecko due to platform requirements. An optimized version is also available on the Amazon Fire TV as one of the two main browsers available with Amazon's Silk Browser.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Mozilla Firefox
(Browser)
Mozilla Firefox, or simply Firefox, is a free and open-source web browser developed by the Mozilla Foundation and its subsidiary, the Mozilla Corporation. It uses the Gecko rendering engine to display web pages, which implements current and anticipated web standards. In November 2017, Firefox began incorporating new technology under the code name "Quantum" to promote parallelism and a more intuitive user interface. Firefox is available for Windows 10 or later versions, macOS, and Linux. Its unofficial ports are available for various Unix and Unix-like operating systems, including FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD, illumos, and Solaris Unix. It is also available for Android and iOS. However, as with all other iOS web browsers, the iOS version uses the WebKit layout engine instead of Gecko due to platform requirements. An optimized version is also available on the Amazon Fire TV as one of the two main browsers available with Amazon's Silk Browser.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mozilla Firefox
(Browser)
Mozilla Firefox, or simply Firefox, is a free and open-source web browser developed by the Mozilla Foundation and its subsidiary, the Mozilla Corporation. It uses the Gecko rendering engine to display web pages, which implements current and anticipated web standards. In November 2017, Firefox began incorporating new technology under the code name "Quantum" to promote parallelism and a more intuitive user interface. Firefox is available for Windows 10 or later versions, macOS, and Linux. Its unofficial ports are available for various Unix and Unix-like operating systems, including FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD, illumos, and Solaris Unix. It is also available for Android and iOS. However, as with all other iOS web browsers, the iOS version uses the WebKit layout engine instead of Gecko due to platform requirements. An optimized version is also available on the Amazon Fire TV as one of the two main browsers available with Amazon's Silk Browser.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: LMMS [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: LMMS [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
LMMS
(Music Production)
LMMS es una estación de trabajo de audio digital libre de código abierto y multiplataforma que permite producir música con la computadora. Es una alternativa a programas como FL Studio, Logic Pro o Cubase puesto que son de corte profesional.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
LMMS
(Music Production)
LMMS es una estación de trabajo de audio digital libre de código abierto y multiplataforma que permite producir música con la computadora. Es una alternativa a programas como FL Studio, Logic Pro o Cubase puesto que son de corte profesional.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
LMMS
(Music Production)
LMMS es una estación de trabajo de audio digital libre de código abierto y multiplataforma que permite producir música con la computadora. Es una alternativa a programas como FL Studio, Logic Pro o Cubase puesto que son de corte profesional.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: Kotatogram [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Kotatogram [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Kotatogram
(Chat & Messenging)
Kotatogram Desktop, being based on Telegram Desktop, has all its features, but it also has some more useful and cosmetic features.
Published on: Dec 31, 2021 at 08:00 PM

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: Subtitle Composer [Video Apps]
item.itunes:title: Subtitle Composer [Video Apps]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Subtitle Composer
(Video Apps)
This release contains lots of bugfixes and new features including:
November 06, 2023
Automatic translations using DeepL or Google Cloud
WebVTT format support
Subtitle positioning UI and support
Subtitle class/comments/voice UI and support
Improved rich text editing/preview
Rich text rendering on waveform/video/editors
Qt6 support
FFmpeg 5 support
Subtitle lines are always time sorted; remove sort lines menu action
Replaced Kross with QJSEngine, removed ruby and python support
Improved script manager and tools menu.

NOTE: Im not the owner of this application, only provide the updated app for you.
[read more]
item.description:
Subtitle Composer
(Video Apps)
This release contains lots of bugfixes and new features including:
November 06, 2023
Automatic translations using DeepL or Google Cloud
WebVTT format support
Subtitle positioning UI and support
Subtitle class/comments/voice UI and support
Improved rich text editing/preview
Rich text rendering on waveform/video/editors
Qt6 support
FFmpeg 5 support
Subtitle lines are always time sorted; remove sort lines menu action
Replaced Kross with QJSEngine, removed ruby and python support
Improved script manager and tools menu.

NOTE: Im not the owner of this application, only provide the updated app for you.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Subtitle Composer
(Video Apps)
This release contains lots of bugfixes and new features including:
November 06, 2023
Automatic translations using DeepL or Google Cloud
WebVTT format support
Subtitle positioning UI and support
Subtitle class/comments/voice UI and support
Improved rich text editing/preview
Rich text rendering on waveform/video/editors
Qt6 support
FFmpeg 5 support
Subtitle lines are always time sorted; remove sort lines menu action
Replaced Kross with QJSEngine, removed ruby and python support
Improved script manager and tools menu.

NOTE: Im not the owner of this application, only provide the updated app for you.
[read more]

item.title: JTWhatsApp [Chat & Messenging]

item.itunes:author: jtwa

JTWhatsApp
(Chat & Messenging)
JTWhatsApp is an android whatsapp mod which is based on Fouad Mods base. It is being developed by Jim from JiMODs.
